zh.lifeSummary: 當Alice Peverel於大約1115年出生在英國英格蘭坎布利其爾布時，她的父親Robert Peverell37歲，母親Adelicia de Verdun51歲。她於1126年與Hamon de Pêche在英國素福爾可維其哈布盧可結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和1個女兒的父母。她去世於1188年9月29日之後在英國英格蘭哈普爾。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Alice Peverel于大约1115年出生在英国英格兰坎布利其爾布时，她的父亲Robert Peverell37岁，母亲Adelicia de Verdun51岁。她于1126年与Hamon de Pêche在英国素福爾可維其哈布盧可结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和1个女儿的父母。她去世于1188年9月29日之后在英国英格兰哈普爾。

nameMeanings.name: Peverel
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

variants.name: Peverall
meanings: Norman, English: relationship name from Old French Peurel (Latin Piperellus), a diminutive of Old French pevre ‘pepper’ (Anglo-Norman French peivere, Latin piper), originally perhaps used as a nickname on the Continent but used as a personal name in Anglo-Norman England.

nameMeanings.name: Alice
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Originally a variant of Adelaide , representing an Old French spelling of a reduced form of Germanic Adalheidis. Alice and Adelaide were already regarded as distinct names in English during the medieval period. Alice enjoyed a surge of popularity in the 19th century and periods of favour ever since. It was the name of the central character of Lewis Carroll's Alice's Adventures in Wonderland ( 1865 ) and Through the Looking Glass ( 1872 ), who was based on his child friend Alice Liddell , daughter of the Dean of Christ Church, Oxford.

en.lifeSummary: When Alice Peverel was born about 1115, in Bourn, Cambridgeshire, England, United Kingdom, her father, Robert Peverell, was 37 and her mother, Adelicia de Verdun, was 51. She married Hamon de Pêche in 1126, in Wickhambrook, Suffolk, England. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 1 daughter. She died after 29 September 1188, in Hampshire, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Alice Peverel est née environ 1115, à Bourn, Cambridgeshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Robert Peverell, avait 37 ans et sa mère, Adelicia de Verdun, avait 51 ans. Elle a épousé Hamon de Pêche en 1126, à Wickhambrook, Suffolk, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 1 fille. Elle est décédée après 29 septembre 1188, à Hampshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Alice Peverel um 1115 in Bourn, Cambridgeshire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Robert Peverell 37 und ihre Mutter Adelicia de Verdun 51. Sie hat 1126 in Wickhambrook, Suffolk, England Hamon de Pêche geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Sie starb nach 29. September 1188 in Hampshire, England, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Alice Peverel è nata il circa 1115 nel Bourn, Cambridgeshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, sua padre, Robert Peverell, aveva 37 anni e sua madre, Adelicia de Verdun, aveva 51 anni. Lei sposato Hamon de Pêche nel 1126, nel Wickhambrook, Suffolk, England. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 1 figlia. Morì dopo il 29 settembre 1188, nel Hampshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Alice Peverelが約1115年にイギリスイギリスカンブリジェシュアイアボウルンで生まれた時，父Robert Peverellは37歳，母Adelicia de Verdunは51歳であった。1126年にイギリススフォルクウィックハンブルークでHamon de Pêcheと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼女は1188年9月29日以後にイギリスイギリスハンプシュアイアで死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Alice Peverel(이)가 대략 1115년 영국 잉글랜드 캄브리지실르 부른에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Robert Peverell(은)는 37세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Adelicia de Verdun(은)는 51세였다. 그녀는 1126년 영국 수폴크 윅함브룩에서 Hamon de Pêche(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1188년 9월 29일 이후 영국 잉글랜드 함프실르에서 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Alice Peverel nasceu aproximadamente 1115, em Bourn, Cambridgeshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Robert Peverell, tinha 37 anos e sua mãe, Adelicia de Verdun, tinha 51 anos. Ela casou-se com Hamon de Pêche em 1126, em Wickhambrook, Suffolk, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 1 filha. Ela faleceu após 29 de setembro de 1188, em Hampshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Alice Peverel родилась около 1115 г. в местности бурн, камбриджешир, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени Robert Peverell было 37 лет, а матери, которую звали Adelicia de Verdun, 51. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Hamon de Pêche в 1126 г. в местности виккхамбрук, суффолк, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 1 дочь. Она умерла после 29 сентябрь 1188 г. в местности хампшир, Англия, Великобритания.

sm.Abt 1115–Aft 29 September 1188: e tusa o le 1115–ina ua ma'ea le 29 Setema 1188

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Alice Peverel nació aproximadamente 1115, en Bourn, Cambridgeshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Robert Peverell, tenía 37 años y su mamá, Adelicia de Verdun, tenía 51 años. Se casó con Hamon de Pêche en 1126, en Wickhambrook, Suffolk, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 1 hija. Murió después de 29 de septiembre de 1188, en Hampshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
